zeta.ammo.sg8f_ammo.desc: When fuel, oxidizer, and intense heat converge, blazing flames surge skyward.
zeta.ammo.sg8f_ammo.name: §6Dragon's Breath Cartridge
zeta.ammo.sg8s_ammo.name: Rifled Slug
zeta.ammo.ultimatum_ammo.name: §4Mini Nuke☢
zeta.attachment.ap_arrow.desc:
§e[Need “GunsmithLib”]
Fires heavy bolts that are highly penetrating and can weaken the target
zeta.attachment.gr8_f.desc: Incendiary bombs, slightly increase the explosion radius and explosion damage, and can ignite the target it hits for a long time
zeta.attachment.gr8_he.desc: Lower direct damage, but massive explosions.
zeta.attachment.jet.desc:
It can bounce continuously and explode continuously at an appropriate angle
making it a good helper for clearing indoor spaces.
zeta.attachment.pos_arrow.desc:
§e[Need “GunsmithLib”]
Fires less powerful glowing toxic bolts that can accumulate poisonous marks on the target
zeta.attachment.stock_sh20.desc: Equipped with a melee weapon to defend against attacks from the front.
zeta.block.terminal.desc:
§eOur way of life,Galaxy wide,
§ePaved with the skull of those who've died
zeta.block.terminal.name: Super Earth Wireless Terminal
zeta.gun.ac7.name: AC-7 Autocannon
zeta.gun.apw1.name: APW-1 Anti-Materiel Rifle
zeta.gun.ar2.desc: Is the oil flowing within the body AK or AR?
zeta.gun.ar2.name: §6AR-2 'Coyote'
zeta.gun.ar32.name: §3AR-32 'Pacifier'
zeta.gun.ar61.desc: It is a good day to die!
zeta.gun.ar61.name: AR-61 'Tenderizer'
zeta.gun.arc12.desc:
This terrifying thing will generate an electric arc and shock the target directly in front,
no matter friend or foe
zeta.gun.arc12.name: §3ARC-12 'Thunderbolt'
zeta.gun.br_14.desc: §eSuper Earth salutes every Helldiver who stands resolute in the face of annihilation.
zeta.gun.br_14.name: BR-14 'Adjudicator'
zeta.gun.cqc30.desc: Old soldiers never die, they just fade away
zeta.gun.cqc30.name: §3CQC-30 Stun Baton
zeta.gun.crossbow.name: §4CB-9 Explosing Crossbow
zeta.gun.gl21.desc: Chain grenade launcher, capable of effectively crushing small and medium-sized targets
zeta.gun.gl21.name: §4GL-21 Grenade Launcher
zeta.gun.gp31.desc: A handgun that fires grenades, must be reloaded after each shot.
zeta.gun.gp31.name: GP-31 Grenade Pistol
zeta.gun.gr8.desc: A hundred years ago, my ancestors were using Gustav to kill Cyborgs.
zeta.gun.gr8.name: §4GR-8 Recoilless Rifle
zeta.gun.las58.desc: Non traditional revolvers only require replacing the radiator after overheating, without the need to change ammunition.
zeta.gun.las58.name: §eLAS-58 'Talon'
zeta.gun.las98.desc: Burn in the light of Democracy!
zeta.gun.las98.name: §eLAS-98 Laser Cannon
zeta.gun.las_16.desc: A rifle that can instantly spray high-energy beams.If it overheats, a new radiator needs to be replaced.
zeta.gun.las_16.name: §eLAS-16 'Sickle'
zeta.gun.las_5.desc: A rifle capable of firing a continuous laser beam eliminates the need for reloading bullets.
zeta.gun.las_5.name: §eLAS-5 'Scythe'
zeta.gun.m105.name: M-105 'Stalwart'
zeta.gun.m206.name: M-206 Heavy Machinegun
zeta.gun.mp98.desc: Go now-And fear the shadow of neither death no tyranny for justice is your cause.
zeta.gun.mp98.name: MP-98 'Knight'
zeta.gun.p113.desc: History hangs high like a mirror, and its verdict will eventually be made
zeta.gun.p113.name: P-113 'Verdict'
zeta.gun.p4.desc: A reliable heavy revolver that can deliver a fatal blow to enemies
zeta.gun.p4.name: P-4 'Senator'
zeta.gun.plas101.desc: Purification of unclean and profane things
zeta.gun.plas101.name: §3PLAS-101 'Purifier'
zeta.gun.plas45.desc:
To the next EPOCH.
§eWarning!Overcharging may lead to the failure of the plasma confinement device!
zeta.gun.plas45.name: §3PLAS-45 EPOCH
zeta.gun.plas_1.desc:
Plasma rifle, capable of firing a beam of superheated gas that detonates upon reaching the firing point. 
Please do not stand near the explosion site.
zeta.gun.plas_1.name: §3PLAS-1 'Scorcher'
zeta.gun.quasar.desc: A powerful energy weapon that must be recharged before use
zeta.gun.quasar.name: §eLAS-99 'Quasar'
zeta.gun.r6.desc: Even after three centuries, the lever rifle still has its place.
zeta.gun.r6.name: R-6 'Deadeye'
zeta.gun.railgun.desc: Experimental weapons that focus on armor piercing ability
zeta.gun.railgun.name: §3RS-422 Railgun
zeta.gun.rl77.desc:
Wide-area bombing weapons require a little creativity......
§ebut also the awareness of being sent to heaven.
zeta.gun.rl77.name: §4RL-70 Bouncing Cluster Launcher
zeta.gun.s11.desc:
§e[Need “GunsmithLib”]
This electromagnetic accelerator will launch powerful steel spears and detonate a cloud of explosive gas at the impact point
zeta.gun.s11.name: §2S-11 Speargun
zeta.gun.sg20.desc: Dual magazine humanitarian weapon, capable of shoot flechette and non lethal ammunition
zeta.gun.sg20.name: §6SG-20 'Halt'
zeta.gun.sg225sp.desc: An automatic shotgun that sprays fan-shaped shotgun shells, capable of harvesting large pieces of enemies.
zeta.gun.sg225sp.name: SG-225SP 'Spray&Pray'
zeta.gun.sg451.desc: Double magazine white phosphorus bullet weapon with extremely high repelling power
zeta.gun.sg451.name: §6SG-451 'Cookout'
zeta.gun.sg8.desc: Dual magazine pump action weapon, suitable for clearing small targets.
zeta.gun.sg8.name: SG-8 'Punisher'
zeta.gun.sg8p.desc: Improved pump action weapon, but firing overheated plasma
zeta.gun.sg8p.name: §3SG-8P Plasma 'Punisher'
zeta.gun.sg8s.desc: Dual magazine single head bullet weapon, suitable for severely damaging medium-sized targets
zeta.gun.sg8s.name: SG-8S 'Slugger'
zeta.gun.smg32.desc: Large caliber heavy submachine gun with great recoil, but capable of stopping enemies
zeta.gun.smg32.name: SMG-32 'Reprimand'
zeta.gun.ultimatum.desc:
Think twice before acting.
§4However, for those who have sacrificed their lives in Angel's Venture...
zeta.gun.ultimatum.name: §4GP-31 'Ultimatum'☢
zeta.gun.vg70.desc: §eScience Department Friendly Reminder: Full salvo firing of this weapon may, with a certain probability, trigger issues such as stiff neck and joint fractures...
zeta.gun.vg70.name: §3VG-70 'Variable'
